english_text: I hope everything goes well

I wish I could speak Korean fluently
korean_text: 한국어를 유창하게 할 수 있으면 좋겠다
romanization: hangugeoreul yuchanghage hal su isseumyeon jokgetda

english_text: I hope you are happy
I wish I lived by the sea
I hope we can be friends
korean_text: 우리 친구가 될 수 있으면 좋겠다
romanization: uri chinguga doel su isseumyeon jokgetda

english_text: My biggest wish is to travel

I wish I could eat without gaining weight

romanization: sal an jjigo meogeul su isseumyeon jokgetda

english_text: I hope the weather is nice tomorrow
